profileContext.title: Profile
profileContext.description: Based on gender {{gender}}, height {{heightCm}} cm, weight {{weightKg}} kg, experience {{experienceLevel}}.

profileFormula.title: Body weight & experience estimate
profileFormula.description: Reference weight from body weight {{weightKg}} kg × experience factor {{multiplier}} × 0.5.

bodyReference.title: Body-based reference (growth analysis)
bodyReference.description: Body reference weight from weight {{weightKg}} kg, gender {{gender}}, experience {{experienceLevel}}.

machineSettingMatch.title: Matched machine setting
machineSettingMatch.description: Machine setting weight for gender {{gender}}, experience {{experienceLevel}}, height {{heightCm}} cm.

machineReferenceDb.title: DB reference weight
machineReferenceDb.description: Reference weight from machine settings DB for the same profile range.

personalRecord.title: Personal record (PR)
personalRecord.description: Max set weight across {{workoutCount}} logged sessions on this machine.

lastSessionMax.title: Last session max weight
lastSessionMax.description: Max set weight from your most recent workout log.

avgSessionVolume.title: Average session volume
avgSessionVolume.description: Average total set weight across {{workoutCount}} logged sessions.

volumeGrowth.title: Volume growth rate
volumeGrowth.description: Volume change from first to latest log: {{pct}}%.

cohortAvgMax.title: Similar cohort average
cohortAvgMax.description: Average max weight of {{sampleSize}} users with similar height, weight class, gender, and experience (height {{heightMinCm}}–{{heightMaxCm}} cm).

progressiveTarget.title: Progressive overload target
progressiveTarget.description: Next-step target based on recent max {{baseKg}} kg.

growthNextTarget.title: Growth analysis next target
growthNextTarget.description: Next target from growth analysis based on PR {{baseKg}} kg.

blendedSelection.title: Blended from multiple sources
blendedSelection.description: No workout logs yet; final weight is the average of {{count}} reference values.
